race.comment: SCALABLE (10) flashed home and missed by a whisker first-up over 1400m at Pakenham then was 38 days between runs when she failed at Sale last start. New to this trip but strips fitter and gave the impression when resuming that she needs a mile now. Nice chance at odds. TIMEONLEES (12) returned from a lengthy break with an encouraging third over 1500m at Ballarat last time out. Yet to miss the placings in three second-up runs. Nicely placed to play a key role. PADDYPIE (3) started favourite on debut recently at Seymour and created a good impression, closing strongly at the end of 1300m to get the job done. Needs to go up a rung or two here but the longer trip looks ideal. LISA LASS (11) disappointed last start at Mt Gambier. May be looking for further now but on her best form she can certainly match it with these. OMNIC (16) led and just failed to hold on over 1400m at Nowra last time. Brings a different form line and is not out calculations at double-figure odds.
